ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "sample_a" TEXT /* Description of the first sample */,
  "sample_b" TEXT /* Description of the second sample */,
  "diff" REAL /* Difference in means between the samples */,
  "lwr" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "upr" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "p_adj" REAL /* Adjusted p-value indicating statistical significance */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was performed */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical test performed */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Measure of the magnitude of the difference between samples */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level used for the confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_sample_b FOREIGN KEY ("sample_b") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_sample_a FOREIGN KEY ("sample_a") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year when the sample was collected */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the sample was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the original data file */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Number of observations in the sample */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the sample */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the condition was set */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the report is based on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval as a string */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the comparison */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the comparison */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the methodology used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the comment is resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the visualization is based on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_path" TEXT /* Path to the visualization file */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
